vulnerabilities.overview: Multiple high-risk ports, including RDP (3389), SSH (22), and FTP (21), are open to the public internet. This allows attackers to attempt brute-force credential attacks or exploit service-level vulnerabilities to gain direct access to the server.

recommendations.easy_fix: Close unnecessary management ports (RDP, SSH, FTP) directly on the external firewall.
recommendations.long_term_fix: Move required administrative access behind a secure VPN, ensuring services are not exposed to the public internet.
